name: trainerbase
documentation:
# Trainer Base

[![PyPI version](https://badge.fury.io/py/TrainerBase.svg)](https://badge.fury.io/py/TrainerBase)
[![Downloads](https://static.pepy.tech/badge/trainerbase)](https://pepy.tech/project/trainerbase)

## To create project from template using cookiecutter

```bash
cookiecutter https://gitlab.com/v01d-gl/basic-project-template.git --checkout trainerbase
```

## Examples

[Python Trainers](https://gitlab.com/python-trainers)

methods.name: trainerbase.common.teleport.Teleport.restore_saved_position
documentation: Returns False if position is not saved else True

functions.name: trainerbase.memory.get_module_address
documentation:
Returns module address.
Raises RuntimeError if the address was not found and retry_limit is reached.

Set retry_limit to None or negative value if you need infinite retry cycle.
Set retry_limit to 0 if you want to disable retries.

methods.name: trainerbase.memory.AOBScan._escape_aob
documentation:
Escape special characters in a string.

Forked re.escape. Simplified. Only for bytes.

methods.name: trainerbase.gui.misc.HotkeyHandlerUI._ensure_callable_has_dunder_code
documentation: DPG add_button has `callback` arg. In this case `callback.__code__` is required.
